title: Experiment definition
description: A single A/B experiment, managed as config-as-code. One file per experiment under experiments/<key>.yml. See specs/0015-experimentation-platform.md.

key.description: Unique, immutable, kebab-case identifier. MUST equal the filename (without extension).

name.description: Human-readable name shown in the portal.

hypothesis.description: What we expect the treatment to change, and why.

owner.description: GitHub handle of the experiment owner, e.g. @wassimwehbi.

surface.description: Logical UI area the experiment touches (e.g. 'dashboard'). Used to forbid two running experiments from colliding on the same surface for overlapping audiences.

status.description: Only 'running' experiments assign variants. Any other status serves the control to everyone.

variants.description: Mutually exclusive variants. Weights MUST sum to 100. The first variant is the control / default.

targeting.description: Restrict the eligible audience. Omit a key (or the whole object) to target everyone.

metrics.description: Event names used to measure the experiment. Reported per-variant in the portal.

tracking_issue.description: Optional GitHub issue number tracking this experiment.
